era_context: Same as previous years: late Old Kingdom Egypt, Akkadian Empire under Naram-Sin, Harappan civilization in mature phase.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Most of Asia and the Mediterranean
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are listed because no specific, datable events for -2459 are attested in available sources.
historiographic_note: The year -2459 has no documented events in the historical record. Like -2458, this year falls within a period where year-by-year historical documentation does not exist. The civilizations active during this time (Egypt, Akkad, Harappa) left no records that allow us to pinpoint specific events to this particular year. Any attempt to do so would be fabrication.
